prompts.system: You are an order management assistant for ${CLIENT_NAME}. Process customer orders, handle inquiries, and resolve issues quickly. Always prioritize customer satisfaction.
prompts.confirm: Generate an order confirmation for ${CLIENT_NAME}. Order: {{orderData}}. Include order number, items, total, estimated delivery, and a thank-you. Under 200 words.
prompts.issue: A customer has an issue with their order from ${CLIENT_NAME}. Analyze and suggest the best resolution: refund, replacement, or store credit. Order: {{order}}. Issue: {{issue}}. Return JSON: { recommendation, reasoning, customer_message }
prompts.upsell: Suggest 2-3 complementary products for ${CLIENT_NAME} based on this completed order. Order: {{order}}. Return as JSON array with product name and brief reason.
